envelope_defaults.human_readable_summary: Usage meter templates describe what is measured + how. Templates do not enforce anything at B2 — they document what a future runtime would track. Enforcement modes are catalog metadata for future B3-B6 implementation.
envelope_defaults.model_usage_notes: Meters are catalog templates. No runtime counting yet. No overage enforcement yet. No revenue recognition yet.

items.name: Active Digital Twin Seats
items.description: Count of active Digital Twin seats during the billing period.
items.human_readable_summary: Active Digital Twin Seats meter. Counts active seats per billing period.
items.model_usage_notes: Active means seat has been assigned + active in the period; not necessarily heavy usage. Future B3+ implements counting + enforcement.
items.governance_notes: Seat counts inform commercial terms but never authorize org-wide intelligence collection.
items.billing_notes: meter_id: active-twin-seats. Counted unit: active seat per month. Enforcement deferred to B3+.
items.counted_event: seat assignment active during the billing period
items.safety_notes: Counting seats is not employee monitoring. No per-user behavior inspection.

items.name: Active Admin Seats
items.description: Count of active Otzar Administrator seats during the billing period.
items.human_readable_summary: Active Admin Seats meter. Counts active admin seats per billing period.
items.model_usage_notes: Admin seats are commercially meaningful + governance-critical. Future B3+ implements counting + enforcement.
items.governance_notes: Admin seat counts inform commercial terms; admin role authority is governance-bound, not billing-bound.
items.billing_notes: meter_id: active-admin-seats. Counted unit: active admin seat per month.
items.counted_event: admin seat assignment active during the billing period
items.safety_notes: Admin counts inform commercial terms; admin authority is governance-bound.

items.name: Active Board / Observer Seats
items.description: Count of active Board / Observer seats during the billing period.
items.human_readable_summary: Active Board / Observer Seats meter. Counts read-only seats per billing period.
items.model_usage_notes: Board / Observer seats are read-only; commercially counted; governance-bound.
items.governance_notes: Board read-only seats are bounded views; counting them does not change their read-only nature.
items.billing_notes: meter_id: active-board-observer-seats. Counted unit: active read-only seat per month.
items.counted_event: observer seat assignment active during the billing period

items.name: Dandelion Activation Runs
items.description: Count of Dandelion full-flow activation runs (Stage A -> F) per billing period.
items.human_readable_summary: Dandelion Activation Runs meter. Counts full-flow runs per period.
items.model_usage_notes: Activation runs are governance-approved org-seeding events. Forward-substrate to D2+ runtime.
items.governance_notes: Counting runs does not authorize them. Each run requires governance approval per ADR-0082 + Amendment 1.
items.billing_notes: meter_id: dandelion-activation-runs. Counted unit: activation run per period.
items.safety_notes: Counting runs is not authorization. Each run is governance-approved.

items.name: Workflow Recommendations
items.description: Count of workflow recommendations surfaced to admins per billing period.
items.human_readable_summary: Workflow Recommendations meter. Counts recommendations per period.
items.model_usage_notes: Recommendation count does not authorize execution.
items.governance_notes: Recommendations are advisory until governance approves execution per ADR-0081 Stage 3+.
items.billing_notes: meter_id: workflow-recommendations. Counted unit: recommendation per period.

items.name: Workflow Runs
items.description: Count of governed workflow executions per billing period.
items.human_readable_summary: Workflow Runs meter. Counts governed workflow executions per period.
items.model_usage_notes: Workflow runs are Foundation-governed Stage 4 executions.
items.governance_notes: Run counts inform commercial terms; governance authorizes each run.
items.billing_notes: meter_id: workflow-runs. Counted unit: run per period.

items.name: Proposed Actions
items.description: Count of proposed Actions per billing period.
items.human_readable_summary: Proposed Actions meter. Counts proposed Actions per period.
items.model_usage_notes: Proposed Action count is decision-support volume; execution remains governed.
items.governance_notes: Proposed Actions are not executed Actions. Execution requires governance approval per Foundation Section 2.
items.billing_notes: meter_id: proposed-actions. Counted unit: proposed Action per period.

items.name: Connector Read Events
items.description: Count of read events across activated connectors per billing period.
items.human_readable_summary: Connector Read Events meter. Counts read events per period.
items.model_usage_notes: Read events are inbound data fetches per ADR-0084.
items.governance_notes: Counting reads is not authorizing reads. Read-first defaults remain.
items.billing_notes: meter_id: connector-read-events. Counted unit: read event per period.
items.safety_notes: Counting is metadata; payload is not in meter.

items.name: Connector Write Events
items.description: Count of write events across activated connectors per billing period.
items.human_readable_summary: Connector Write Events meter. Counts write events per period.
items.model_usage_notes: Write events are approval-gated. Counting them is not authorization.
items.governance_notes: Write counts inform commercial terms; governance authorizes each write.
items.billing_notes: meter_id: connector-write-events. Counted unit: write event per period.
items.safety_notes: Counting is metadata; payload is not in meter.

items.name: Simulation Runs
items.description: Count of Agent Playground simulation runs per billing period.
items.human_readable_summary: Simulation Runs meter. Counts Agent Playground simulations per period.
items.model_usage_notes: Simulations are decision-supporting, never autonomous execution per ADR-0077.
items.governance_notes: Simulation runs honor honesty postures + closed-vocab projection.
items.billing_notes: meter_id: simulation-runs. Counted unit: simulation run per period.

items.name: Audit Exports
items.description: Count of audit export operations (NDJSON / CSV) per billing period.
items.human_readable_summary: Audit Exports meter. Counts audit export operations per period.
items.model_usage_notes: Audit exports are bounded per ADR-0071 hard cap. Exports never delete or modify audit history.
items.governance_notes: Audit exports are governance-bounded. Baseline export during grace + legal window is non-paywallable.
items.billing_notes: meter_id: audit-exports. Counted unit: export operation per period.
items.safety_notes: Legal window exports are never paywalled.

items.name: Evidence Package Generation
items.description: Count of regulator / evidence package generation operations per billing period.
items.human_readable_summary: Evidence Package Generation meter. Counts evidence-package operations per period.
items.model_usage_notes: Evidence packages are governance-approved + LawfulBasis-gated when regulator-tier per ADR-0036.
items.governance_notes: Evidence package generation does not certify compliance. Neutral compliance vocabulary required per ADR-0070.
items.billing_notes: meter_id: evidence-package-generation. Counted unit: package per period.
items.safety_notes: Generation is substrate; certification is the regulator's call.

items.name: Memory Capsule Volume
items.description: Count or storage volume of memory capsules per billing period.
items.human_readable_summary: Memory Capsule Volume meter. Counts capsule volume per period. Baseline DMW is never paywalled.
items.model_usage_notes: Volume meter informs commercial terms; baseline DMW memory safety is always included per ADR-0083 + ADR-0001.
items.governance_notes: Customers should not pay extra just to have memory be safe. Volume counting is commercial; baseline safety is not.
items.billing_notes: meter_id: memory-capsule-volume. Counted unit: capsule-count or storage-bytes per period.
items.safety_notes: Baseline DMW safety is never paywalled.

items.name: Advanced DMW Governance Events
items.description: Count of advanced DMW governance events (custom retention extension, regulated deletion variant, lawful-basis composition) per billing period.
items.human_readable_summary: Advanced DMW Governance Events meter. Counts premium DMW governance events per period.
items.model_usage_notes: Premium events are advanced governance, not basic safety. Basic safety remains baseline.
items.governance_notes: Advanced events extend governance; baseline RULE 0 sovereignty + revocability never reduced.
items.billing_notes: meter_id: advanced-dmw-governance-events. Counted unit: event per period.
items.safety_notes: Advanced governance never reduces baseline safety.

items.name: High-volume Listener / Transcript Processing
items.description: Forward-substrate meter for high-volume listener / transcript processing once that surface lights up.
items.human_readable_summary: High-volume Listener / Transcript Processing meter. Forward-substrate. Counts processing events per period.
items.model_usage_notes: Listener surface is forward-substrate per ADR-0052 build order; meter is templated but unused at B2.
items.governance_notes: Listener processing inherits transcript ownership / retention / scope policy when surface lands.
items.billing_notes: meter_id: high-volume-listener-transcript-processing. Counted unit: processing-event per period. Status: forward-substrate.
items.safety_notes: Listener surface is governance-first when it lands.

items.name: External API Calls
items.description: Forward-substrate meter for external API calls when externalized later.
items.human_readable_summary: External API Calls meter. Forward-substrate. Counts external API call volume per period.
items.model_usage_notes: External API meter templated for future external-API surface; unused at B2.
items.governance_notes: External API access is governance-bound and audit-traced.
items.billing_notes: meter_id: external-api-calls. Counted unit: api-call per period. Status: forward-substrate.
